expectations.text: Creates a top-level Acme-Corp or acme-corp directory
Includes at minimum: contracts, deliverables, invoices, and meeting-notes subdirectories
Provides a script or code to create the structure
Follows the consulting client pattern from the skill
expectations.evidence: References 'skill's consulting pattern', uses Consulting/Clients/ structure

expectations.text: Structure is created in a sensible location or user is asked about location
expectations.evidence: 'Happy to adjust if you prefer a different path' with default ~/Consulting/Clients/
